description: Promote web search and web fetch to first-class hex capabilities. Mirrors the inference-broker architecture: WebSearchPort + WebFetchPort traits in hex-core, multiple secondary adapters (Brave, Tavily, SerpAPI, DuckDuckGo) in hex-nexus, REST endpoints, MCP tools, CLI, secret-grant integration, audit trail via a new web_request SpacetimeDB table, and a dashboard panel. Replaces third-party context-mode fetch/search. Unblocks standalone mode web access.

phases.description: Define WebSearchPort, WebFetchPort, and supporting domain types in hex-core. No adapters yet. cargo check --workspace must pass.
phases.name: Port traits & domain types

tasks.description: In hex-core/src/domain/web.rs: define SearchResult { url: Url, title: String, snippet: String, rank: u32 }, SearchOptions { limit: u32, locale: Option<String>, safe_search: bool }, FetchedPage { url: Url, status: u16, content_type: Option<String>, text: String, markdown: Option<String>, fetched_at: SystemTime }, FetchOptions { format: FetchFormat (Raw|Text|Markdown), max_bytes: usize, timeout: Duration, cache: bool }, WebProvider enum (Brave|Tavily|SerpApi|DuckDuckGo). Re-export from hex-core/src/domain/mod.rs.
tasks.name: Domain types: SearchResult, SearchOptions, FetchedPage, FetchOptions, WebProvider enum

tasks.description: In hex-core/src/ports/web.rs: async trait WebSearchPort { async fn search(&self, query: &str, opts: SearchOptions) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>, WebError>; fn provider(&self) -> WebProvider; } and async trait WebFetchPort { async fn fetch(&self, url: &Url, opts: FetchOptions) -> Result<FetchedPage, WebError>; }. Define WebError enum (ProviderError, RateLimited, AuthFailure, Timeout, Parse). Export from hex-core/src/ports/mod.rs.
tasks.name: Port traits: WebSearchPort + WebFetchPort

phases.description: Implement WebFetchPort using reqwest with shared Client. Extract markdown via readability crate. Honors max_bytes, timeout, format selection, hex UA. cargo test -p hex-nexus web_fetch must pass.
phases.name: Web fetch adapter (Reqwest + readability)

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_fetch.rs: impl WebFetchPort for ReqwestFetchAdapter. Use a shared reqwest::Client built once in composition-root with 30s timeout, hex/{version} UA, gzip, redirect limit 10. Enforce max_bytes via response.bytes_stream() with accumulating counter. For FetchFormat::Markdown, run readability::extractor::extract on the HTML and produce markdown via html2md. For Text, strip HTML tags via scraper::Html. Map reqwest errors to WebError variants.
tasks.name: ReqwestFetchAdapter

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_cache.rs: CacheLayer that wraps a WebFetchPort. Stores FetchedPage as JSON at ~/.hex/cache/web/{sha256(url)}.json with a sidecar .meta file holding fetched_at. On fetch, read cache if age < 24h and opts.cache == true. Bypassed by --no-cache (opts.cache == false). Configurable via web.cache_enabled flag.
tasks.name: Fetch cache (filesystem, 24h TTL)

tasks.description: hex-nexus/tests/web_fetch.rs: spin up a wiremock::MockServer serving a fixture HTML file (docs.rs-style page). Assert Raw returns bytes unchanged, Text strips tags, Markdown produces headings+links preserved. Assert max_bytes truncates. Assert 404 maps to WebError::ProviderError. Assert cache hit on second call (mock expect().times(1)).
tasks.name: Contract test: fetch golden fixture

phases.description: End-to-end zero-config search: DuckDuckGo works without any API key; Brave works when key present. Provider fallback: brave -> duckduckgo if brave fails or unauth.
phases.name: Brave + DuckDuckGo search adapters (zero-config path)

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_search_brave.rs: impl WebSearchPort for BraveSearchAdapter { client: Arc<Client>, api_key: SecretString }. Calls https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search with X-Subscription-Token header. Parses web.results[] into SearchResult. Returns provider() == WebProvider::Brave. Maps 401 to WebError::AuthFailure, 429 to RateLimited.
tasks.name: BraveSearchAdapter

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_search_ddg.rs: impl WebSearchPort. POSTs to https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/ with q=<query>. Uses scraper::Selector (div.result > h2.result__title > a.result__a) for title+url and div.result__snippet for snippet. Limited to first 20 results. Fragile by design — documented as fallback only.
tasks.name: DuckDuckGoAdapter (HTML scrape, no key)

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_search_broker.rs: impl WebSearchPort for WebSearchBroker { adapters: Vec<Arc<dyn WebSearchPort>> }. search() iterates adapters in order, returns first non-empty Ok result. Logs each adapter attempt with ms timing. Provider identity reported as WebProvider of first adapter that returned results.
tasks.name: WebSearchBroker with fallback chain

tasks.description: hex-nexus/tests/web_search.rs: Brave test posts a canned JSON response to MockServer, asserts parsing. DDG test serves fixture HTML snapshot, asserts 10 results parsed. Broker test: Brave adapter returns AuthFailure, DDG returns 3 results — broker returns DDG results and logs fallback.
tasks.name: Contract tests: Brave + DDG against wiremock fixtures

phases.description: Higher-tier providers. Tavily optimized for research snippets; SerpAPI for Google/Bing parity. Both require API keys.
phases.name: Tavily + SerpAPI adapters

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_search_tavily.rs: POST https://api.tavily.com/search with {api_key, query, max_results, search_depth: 'advanced'}. Parse results[] into SearchResult, using content field as snippet.
tasks.name: TavilySearchAdapter

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_search_serpapi.rs: GET https://serpapi.com/search.json?q=&api_key=&engine=google. Parse organic_results[] into SearchResult.
tasks.name: SerpApiSearchAdapter

phases.description: POST /api/web/search and POST /api/web/fetch. Every request writes to web_request SpacetimeDB table for audit + dashboard.
phases.name: REST endpoints + audit trail table

tasks.description: spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/web_request.rs: define table web_request { id: u64 #[auto_inc] #[primary_key], kind: String ('search'|'fetch'), provider: String, query_or_url: String, status: String, latency_ms: u32, bytes_or_count: u32, agent_id: Option<String>, created_at: Timestamp }. Reducer log_web_request(ctx, kind, provider, qu, status, latency_ms, bc, agent_id) inserts a row. Wire into lib.rs.
tasks.name: web_request SpacetimeDB table + reducer

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/routes/web.rs: axum handler post(search_handler). Body: { query, provider: Option<String>, limit: Option<u32>, locale: Option<String> }. Resolves WebSearchPort impl via provider override or broker default. Times the call, logs to web_request via reducer. Returns 200 with { provider_used, results: Vec<SearchResult>, latency_ms }.
tasks.name: POST /api/web/search route

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/routes/web.rs: post(fetch_handler). Body: { url, format: 'raw'|'text'|'markdown', max_bytes?, cache?: bool }. Calls WebFetchPort, times it, logs to web_request, returns FetchedPage serialized.
tasks.name: POST /api/web/fetch route

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/composition/mod.rs: build shared reqwest Client once. Build BraveSearchAdapter if brave_api_key present, TavilySearchAdapter if tavily key present, SerpApiSearchAdapter if serpapi key present, DuckDuckGoAdapter always. Assemble WebSearchBroker per project config web.fallback_chain (default [brave, duckduckgo]). Build ReqwestFetchAdapter wrapped in CacheLayer when web.cache_enabled. Store in AppState so routes can access.
tasks.name: Compose web ports in nexus composition root

tasks.description: hex-nexus/tests/web_routes.rs: boot axum TestServer with composition using wiremock for all outbound providers. Hit POST /api/web/search and POST /api/web/fetch. Assert web_request table received a row (via reducer mock or by querying an in-memory SQLite shim). Assert provider fallback logged.
tasks.name: Route integration tests

phases.description: hex web search/fetch CLI subcommands + hex_web_search + hex_web_fetch MCP tools. All delegate to the REST API.
phases.name: CLI + MCP exposure

tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/web.rs: enum WebAction { Search { query: String, #[arg(long)] provider: Option<String>, #[arg(long)] limit: Option<u32> }, Fetch { url: String, #[arg(long, default_value='markdown')] format: String, #[arg(long)] no_cache: bool } }. Posts to hex-nexus REST endpoints. Prints results as table (search) or markdown-to-stdout (fetch). Wire into Cli::run() match.
tasks.name: hex web CLI subcommand

tasks.description: hex-cli/src/mcp/tools.rs (or wherever tools are registered): register hex_web_search and hex_web_fetch. Inputs mirror CLI. Outputs JSON. Both delegate to the same REST API as the CLI. Update mcp-tools.json schema.
tasks.name: hex_web_search + hex_web_fetch MCP tools

phases.description: Register web API keys via hex secrets set web.<provider>_api_key. Standalone mode reads HEX_<PROVIDER>_API_KEY env.
phases.name: Secret-grant integration for API keys

tasks.description: spacetime-modules/secret-grant/src/lib.rs: register recognized keys web.brave_api_key, web.tavily_api_key, web.serpapi_api_key. Update allowlist so TTL-grant flow works for them.
tasks.name: Register web.* secret keys in secret-grant

tasks.description: hex-nexus/src/adapters/secondary/web_secrets.rs: resolve_web_key(provider) tries SpacetimeDB secret-grant first; on offline/error, falls back to env HEX_BRAVE_API_KEY / HEX_TAVILY_API_KEY / HEX_SERPAPI_API_KEY. Used during composition (P5.4).
tasks.name: Env-fallback resolver for standalone mode

phases.description: Render last-24h web activity from web_request table on the dashboard. Mirror the inference panel layout.
phases.name: Dashboard Web I/O panel

tasks.description: hex-nexus/assets/src/panels/WebIoPanel.tsx: Solid component subscribing to web_request via SpacetimeDB WebSocket. Columns: time, kind, provider, query/url (truncated, click to expand), status, latency. Filter by kind (search/fetch) and provider. Aggregate row at top: calls-last-24h, p50/p95 latency, error rate.
tasks.name: Web I/O panel (Solid.js)

phases.description: Rewrite context-templates/web-*.md to point at hex_web_* tools. Update agent YAMLs. Update CLAUDE.md tool precedence table.
phases.name: Agent + doc migration: remove context-mode web references

tasks.description: hex-cli/assets/context-templates/tools/web-search.md and web-fetch.md: replace references to generic WebSearch and ctx_fetch_and_index with hex_web_search and hex_web_fetch. Update 'Prefer these over WebSearch' table. Keep the 'never generate URLs' and 'Sources:' rules. Add a note on provider fallback + caching.

matching_commits: d237750b feat(context-engineering): P4/P5 - template files + file-based PromptAdapter

tasks.name: Rewrite context templates

tasks.description: In hex-cli/assets/agents/hex/hex/{dependency-analyst,behavioral-spec-writer,feature-developer}.yml: add hex_web_search and hex_web_fetch to the allowed tools list. Remove any references to ctx_fetch_and_index or implicit WebSearch.
tasks.name: Add hex_web_* tools to relevant agent YAMLs

tasks.description: CLAUDE.md: add row 'Web search/fetch | mcp__hex__hex_web_search / mcp__hex__hex_web_fetch' to BOTH tool-precedence tables (there are two — global section and project section). Add a note that context-mode ctx_fetch_and_index must not be used for hex-scope work.

matching_commits: 092a0aec feat(inference): wp-tiered-inference-routing P4+P5 — escalation, tracking, integration
91d782aa primary(p5.3): Document tiered routing in CLAUDE.md + README.md
79531fff chore(finalize): mark ADR-2604050900 accepted, update CLAUDE.md for 7 modules (P6)
87d0aa36 feat: close P0 workplans — secrets tests, agent-task-sync docs

tasks.name: Update CLAUDE.md tool precedence table

phases.description: Provider health checks + recorded contract fixtures so adapter drift is caught in CI.

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-cli doctor_web && cargo test -p hex-nexus --test web_contract

phases.name: hex doctor web + provider contract fixtures

tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/doctor/web.rs: probe each configured provider with a canned query ('hex architecture'). Report OK/FAIL per provider with last-call latency. Reports whether fallback chain has at least one working provider. Wire into doctor dispatch.
tasks.name: hex doctor web subcommand

tasks.description: hex-nexus/tests/web_contract.rs: snapshot test — each adapter parses its recorded fixture. Fixtures live in tests/fixtures/web/*.{json,html} and are regenerated manually with a hex web search --record-fixture flag (to be added as a dev-only subcommand). CI runs the snapshot tests; drift fails the build.
tasks.name: Provider contract fixtures + nightly-drift test
